content.json:
## AI Security Platform — Runtime Overview

This workbook visualises events forwarded from the AI Security Platform's runtime agent via the legacy HTTP Data Collector. Filter by `OrgId_s` to scope to a tenant.

content.query:
AiSecurity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Events = count() by EventType_s
| order by Events desc
content.title: Events by type (24h)

content.query:
AiSecurity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Severity_s in ('high', 'critical')
| project TimeGenerated, OrgId_s, Severity_s, Title_s, AssetId_s, CorrelationId_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: High-severity findings (24h)

content.query:
AiSecurity_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventType_s == 'runtime_event'
| extend Detail = parse_json(Detail_s)
| where Detail.action_taken == 'blocked'
| summarize Blocks = count() by AssetId_s
| top 10 by Blocks desc
content.title: Top 10 assets by blocked traffic (7d)
